questionHtml:
The equilibrium constant, Kc, for the reaction 2A + 4B ⇌ 2C + 4D has a value of 4.0. What is the value of Kc for the reaction below at the same temperature?

C + 2D ⇌ A + 2B

A.  0.25

B.  0.50

C.  1.0

D.  16

meta.title: The equilibrium constant, Kc, for the reaction 2A + 4B ⇌ 2C + 4D has a value of 4.0. What is the value of Kc for the reaction below at the same temperature? C + 2D ⇌ A + 2B A. 0.25
